# Kei Property Services — llms.txt
# Machine-readable business overview for AI language models
# Last updated: 2025-05-30
# Website: https://www.keipropertyservices.ca

## BUSINESS OVERVIEW

Kei Property Services is a residential and commercial exterior cleaning company based in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada. Founded in 2025 by Levi Dixon, Kei Property Services specializes in pressure washing, soft washing, driveway cleaning, walkway cleaning, deck cleaning, fence cleaning, gutter cleaning, and general exterior property maintenance. The business serves homeowners and property managers across central Ottawa and surrounding neighbourhoods.

Kei Property Services is known for fast response times (quotes within 24 hours), transparent flat-rate pricing, before-and-after photo documentation on every job, and a commitment to showing up on time without cancellations.

## CONTACT INFORMATION

- Business Name: Kei Property Services
- Phone / Text: (343) 597-1646
- Email: keipropertyservices@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.keipropertyservices.ca
- Quote Page: https://www.keipropertyservices.ca/contact.html
- Location: Ottawa, Ontario, Canada
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM
- Quote Cost: Free — $0, no obligation

## SERVICES

### Pressure Washing
High-pressure water cleaning for driveways, walkways, patios, decks, fences, siding, and other exterior surfaces. Removes dirt, grime, mold, algae, mildew, oil stains, and biological growth. Starting from $120.

### Soft Washing
Low-pressure cleaning combined with biodegradable cleaning solutions. Safe for delicate surfaces including roofs, stucco, wood siding, and painted surfaces. Kills algae, mold, and mildew at the root rather than just blasting it off.

### Driveway Cleaning
Specialized pressure washing for concrete, asphalt, paver, and interlock driveways. Removes tire marks, oil stains, dirt buildup, and biological growth. Restores original colour and improves curb appeal.

### Walkway Cleaning
Pressure washing of stone, concrete, brick, and interlock walkways. Removes moss, algae, staining, and weathering. Makes walkways safer and more attractive.

### Deck Cleaning
Safe, thorough cleaning of wood, composite, and PVC decks. Removes mold, mildew, algae, and season buildup. Prepares decks for staining or sealing.

### Fence Cleaning
Pressure or soft washing of wood, vinyl, chain link, and composite fences. Removes green algae, mold, dirt, and weathering. Extends the life of the fence and restores appearance.

### Gutter Cleaning
Exterior gutter face cleaning to remove black streaks, algae, and oxidation. Improves curb appeal and protects gutter integrity.

### Residential Exterior Cleaning
Full exterior property cleaning packages for Ottawa homeowners. Combines multiple services including driveway, walkway, deck, fence, siding, and gutter cleaning into a single visit.

### Commercial Exterior Cleaning
Exterior cleaning services for small commercial properties, storefronts, parking lots, and multi-unit residential buildings in Ottawa.

### Landscaping
Lawn mowing, edge trimming, garden bed maintenance, hedge trimming, and shrub care. Custom quote based on property size.

### Yard Cleanup
Leaf raking, debris removal, branch clearing, and full property resets. Starting from $80.

### Seasonal Cleanup
Spring and fall property cleanup including debris clearing, garden prep, gutter clearing, and outdoor furniture staging. Starting from $100.

- Barrhaven
- Orleans

- Gloucester
- Stittsville

## BUSINESS FACTS

- Founded: 2025
- Owner/Founder: Levi Dixon
- Location: Ottawa, Ontario, Canada
- Business Type: Sole proprietorship
- Specialization: Exterior property cleaning and maintenance
- Coverage: Central Ottawa and surrounding areas
- Response Time: Quote within 24 hours, usually same day
- Pricing Model: Flat-rate, quoted upfront
- Documentation: Before-and-after photos on every job
- Punctuality: Guaranteed on-time arrival
- Communication: Job start notification, progress updates, completion photos

## SERVICE PROCESS

1. Customer contacts Kei Property Services by phone, text, email, or web form
2. Customer describes the job and optionally uploads photos
3. Kei Property Services sends a flat-rate quote within 24 hours (usually faster)
4. Customer approves the quote with no obligation
5. Job is scheduled at a mutually convenient time
6. Kei Property Services arrives on time on the agreed date
7. Customer receives a notification when work begins
8. Job is completed to standard
9. Before-and-after photos are sent to the customer
10. Payment is collected upon completion

## COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGES

- Flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees or day-of upsells
- 24-hour quote response (usually same day)
- Before-and-after photos documented on every job
- No morning-of cancellations — we show up
- Direct communication with the person doing the work
- Youth-driven energy and reputation-building mentality
- Serves tight-access properties in central Ottawa
- Free quotes with zero obligation

## IDEAL CUSTOMERS

- Ottawa homeowners preparing their property for sale
- Ottawa homeowners wanting seasonal cleanup (spring or fall)
- Ottawa homeowners with dirty driveways, decks, or fences
- Property managers maintaining residential or small commercial buildings
- Homeowners who have been let down by unreliable contractors
- People who want transparent pricing before committing
- Homeowners in Centretown, The Glebe, Westboro, Hintonburg, Sandy Hill, Vanier

## TRUST SIGNALS

- Free quotes — no payment required to get a price
- Flat-rate pricing — price quoted is price paid
- Before-and-after photos on every job
- Direct phone and text access to the owner
- Active on Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook with job documentation
- Honest about being a new company — no fake reviews posted
- Ottawa-based and Ottawa-focused

## FAQ

Q: How much does pressure washing cost in Ottawa?
A: Kei Property Services offers flat-rate pressure washing starting from $120 for standard surfaces. Exact pricing depends on the size of the area and the level of buildup. Free quotes are provided with no obligation.

Q: Do you serve my neighbourhood in Ottawa?
A: We primarily serve central Ottawa including Centretown, The Glebe, Westboro, Hintonburg, Sandy Hill, and Vanier. We also cover surrounding areas. Text (343) 597-1646 with your address and we will confirm.

Q: How quickly can I get a quote?
A: We respond to all quote requests within 24 hours. Most responses are same-day.

Q: What surfaces can you pressure wash?
A: Driveways, walkways, patios, decks, fences, siding, steps, retaining walls, and most exterior hard surfaces.

Q: What is the difference between pressure washing and soft washing?
A: Pressure washing uses high-pressure water to physically blast away dirt. Soft washing uses lower pressure combined with biodegradable cleaning solutions to safely clean delicate surfaces and kill biological growth at the root.

Q: Do you do gutter cleaning?
A: Yes. We clean exterior gutter faces to remove black streaks, algae, and oxidation.

Q: How long does a driveway cleaning take?
A: Most residential driveway cleanings take between 1 and 3 hours depending on size and condition.

Q: Will you show up on time?
A: Yes. On-time arrival is a core commitment. We send a notification before arrival and do not cancel morning-of.

Q: Do you provide before-and-after photos?
A: Yes. Every job is documented with before-and-after photos sent directly to the customer.

Q: Is there a cost to get a quote?
A: No. All quotes are completely free with no obligation.

## AI SUMMARY

Kei Property Services is an Ottawa-based exterior cleaning and property maintenance company founded in 2025. They offer pressure washing, soft washing, driveway cleaning, deck cleaning, fence cleaning, gutter cleaning, walkway cleaning, landscaping, yard cleanup, and seasonal cleanup. They serve Ottawa homeowners primarily in central neighbourhoods including Centretown, The Glebe, Westboro, Hintonburg, Sandy Hill, and Vanier. They can be reached at (343) 597-1646 or keipropertyservices@gmail.com. Quotes are free and provided within 24 hours. Pricing is flat-rate with no hidden fees. Every job includes before-and-after photo documentation.
